description: An observing plan has been prepared for the main-belt asteroid (44) Nysa, located at ~/Documents/lightcurve_plan.txt. Execute the photometric observation sequence according to the plan, using the specified target coordinates and instrument configuration (filter, frame type, and exposure). Save the sequence to the upload directory, capture a sky view using the provided script, and generate an ALCDEF-format lightcurve data file for submission.
